identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H4. Tight tracking (-0.02em) for large text.

body.usage: Use for paragraphs, UI labels, and data tables.

mono.usage: Use for gene sequences, accession numbers, and code snippets.

colors.mode_strategy: Hybrid (Light for Admin/HR, Dark option for Lab/Analytics)

glassmorphism.usage: Overlays, sticky headers, and modal backdrops.

textures.usage: Subtle noise overlay on dark backgrounds to prevent banding and add tactility.

layout.spacing_system: Generous. Use p-8, p-12, p-16 for sections. p-6 for card internals.

grids.marketing: Tetris Grid (Asymmetric). Mix col-span-4, col-span-8, col-span-full.
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid. Dense, gap-4. Widgets stretch to fill height.

buttons.style: Sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-md). No full pills unless for tags.

inputs.classes: h-10 rounded-md border-slate-200 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-sky-500 focus:border-transparent

hero_background.alt: Modern biotech laboratory with sequencing equipment
hero_background.usage: Hero section background with dark overlay

abstract_bg.usage: Subtle background for 'Our Science' or 'Technology' section

universal_guidelines: Do not use generic gradients. Use solid colors or subtle noise.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
Use 'Manrope' for headings and 'Inter' for body text.
Use generous padding (p-8+) to create breathing room.
Dark mode is for data-heavy views; Light mode for text-heavy views.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 or similar.
Buttons should have clear hierarchy (Primary vs Secondary vs Ghost).
instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a high-trust, scientific platform. Prioritize clarity, data density (in the app), and storytelling (on the landing page). Use the provided images to ground the design in reality. Follow the 'Bio-Digital Precision' theme.
